name: Winged Monkeys
rules_text: H:3 A:1 HP:2(x3) L:1 Nomadic, Flight. Creates three Winged Monkeys. Withdraws at the start of combat round 3. At end of combat, if both groups are still alive, enemy group is carried to a random adjacent unoccupied non-structure square, and Winged Monkeys are removed from the game. (This does not trigger any death effects.)
